title: ReconciliationExplainerOutcome
description: Output of the reconciliation explainer. Used by u36-reconciliation-explainer.sh (Sonnet) for open reconciliation_flags. Hypothesises why a bank transaction has no Xero match.

hypothesis.description: 1-2 sentence explanation of why bank vs Xero don't match.

candidate_match_id.description: vendor_invoice_inbox.id if a candidate invoice was identified.
